title: Lettre de retrait du Pakistan

pages.text:
NO: LT-6/36/72

Ministry of Frugh Affers

Istamabad

Dated, 11th April, 1973.

PAI TA

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs presents its compli ents to the French Eubassy in Islamabad & with reference to their Note

No.222/0 dated the 8th December 1972, regarding withdrawal of pakistan from the International

Institute of refrigeration and has the honour to say that, since the budgetary provision of this country does not perait, pakistan govern- ment seeks to withdraw from membership 12 months after the date of notice, as provided by article 5 of the agreement. This Ministry would be grate- ful, If the Institute concerned is kindly inforned accordingly.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs

avails itself of this opportunity to renew to it the assurances of its very highest consideration.

The Embassy of France,

IsLamabad.

-
